name: UMB Financial Corporation Depositary Shares each representing a 1/400th of 7.00% Fixed-Rate Reset Non-Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock
summary: UMB Financial Corporation Depositary Shares represent ownership in preferred stock of UMB Financial Corporation, a financial services company. These shares pay a fixed-rate dividend and have specific liquidation preferences. UMB Financial Corporation is headquartered in Kansas City, Missouri.
